programmes.show_description: Mother of three Natalie Hemming split up from her partner, believing it would be amicable. But when she disappeared soon after, attention turned to her jilted partner Paul.
Dr Toby is spellbound by his patient, Gideon, Preston's part-time witch, and Dr Natalia Spierings tries to help a young woman with a scalp condition usually found in middle-aged men.
This episode looks at the dangerous obsession with surgery that often goes hand in hand with a rise to fame.
Challengers 'Towel Compoulder' try to defeat the Eggheads to win the rolling prize fund. (Ep7)
In the quiz show, hosted by Jeremy Vine, challengers 'Shuttle Watchers' try to defeat the Eggheads to win the rolling prize fund. (Ep8)

John bids farewell to market trading with help from son Marco. Wendy & Julia host a Halloween fundraiser for animals, while wedding planner Louise faces a crisp-filled challenge.
Leonora and Ben's bar hosts a line dancing event while dodging falling palm tree debris. Jessie conquers her fear of heights, and Tracey tests her new sausage venture in sunny Spain.
In a sports store, a woman protests that she's paid for all her items, but her receipts tell a different story. Plus undercover detective Steve monitors pick pocketing in China Town. (Ep16)
Action-packed highlights from the documentary series following Yorkshire-based law enforcers. Can the cops stop a nighttime riot from breaking out in Bradford?
In Bradford there's a high-octane chase through a housing estate, and Yorkshire's back roads have their peace disturbed by two cars carrying gun-toting drug dealers.
A driver nearly causes carnage to make sure his takeaway stays hot, a large cannabis stash is found at the scene of a crash, and a drunk driver gets caught short.
Dog handler Jon is forced to wrestle with a drunken man, Dan has an early-morning meeting with a drink-driver and a wine-loving shoplifter gets his just desserts.
A violent man wreaks havoc in a hospital and the driver of a stolen VW Beetle rewrites the highway code.
Documentary series. A routine check on a car uncovers suspected drug dealing, a runaway cow causes problems and a wanted petrol thief's stealing spree comes to a halt.

programmes.show_name: Car Pound Cops: Give Me My Car...
programmes.show_description: ...Back! Following car recovery companies tasked with taking illegal, unroadworthy, untaxed, uninsured vehicles off the road and ensuring their owners pay the penalty.
Is Leah saying goodbye forever? Levi and Mackenzie stick their noses in. Tane and Jo need some time alone.
Cash's lie catches up to him. Is Leah walking out on her marriage? Remi's symptoms multiply.
Documentary series. Dr Watson offers 'talking therapy' to a young lady who recently lost her mother and Dr Bower treats a gentleman who is plagued by suicidal thoughts.
We return to Barnsley Casualty where Owen, 4, has a seizure and is immediately taken to resus. Sister Jane deals with a broken chute used to transport bloods.
High-octane medical emergencies include a man found collapsed in a hotel room, a head-on collision between two motorcyclists, and an 11-year-old who's taken a tumble from his scooter.
The team at Hull Royal Infirmary has another busy night: a man is involved in a motorbike collision with a deer and a young patient is in agony with his ankle facing the wrong way.
Dr Natalia Spierings struggles to see acne hidden with makeup by a patient. Dr Toby Nelson is shocked by a patient's DIY attempt on a cyst. Dr Adil Sheraz tackles a stubborn lipoma.
Witnessing a car crime bonanza captured by drones, CCTV, dashcams, mobile phones and police bodycams - from road raging drivers to ram raids gone wrong and high-tech car thieves.
Documentary series. The doctors deal with a woman in the midst of a panic attack, a chronic asthmatic, a man who can only eat eggs and a harrowing diagnosis of stomach cancer.
A fire alarm begins evacuation efforts; a man with potential spine injuries is given pain relief while waiting for scan results.
Dr Natalia Spierings tackles one of the biggest lipomas of her career, Dr Emma McMullen helps a bride six weeks before 'I do'; and Dr Adil Sheraz treats a patient with a face cyst.
Challengers 'The Afflicted' try to defeat the Eggheads to win the rolling prize fund. (Ep9)

...the Sun. New series. Dave aims to lose weight before a baby reveal, Troy plans a send-off for Nanny Tammy, and Paula hosts a bottomless brunch and tug-of-war bash to save her bar.
...the Sun. New series. Chunkz fires up a new BBQ business in Benidorm, Su and Grazie send a foster dog to the UK, and Bambi and Johnny hunt bargains for caravan staging in Spain.
In London, a detective spots a suspect stealing from a leading clothes store. In Newton Abbott, on CCTV, a chief security guard watches a man removing putty from a window. (Ep17)
Yorkshire's traffic cops are in hot pursuit of some criminals dragging a generator with just one wheel across the county, and a van full of contraband in Bradford.
A speeding murder suspect is pursued through downtown Bradford, and a speeding car thief picks a fight with a tree.
A young speeder writes his car off in a spectacular fireball, and cops pursue a car containing a familiar face...
The Operational Support Unit carry out a drugs raid at a farm, a young driver tries impersonating his brother and Craggy has an encounter with a polecat.
A criminal gang are busted in their hotel beds and Craggy and Phil arrest a serial bacon snatcher.
Observational documentary series. In this episode, PC Dodd is on a 'steak out' following a bovine break-out and Jon gets some help from a very unexpected source.
... My Car Back! Specialist car recovery companies help local governments and businesses take care of illegal or dangerous vehicles by getting them off the road.
Cash's lie catches up to him. Is Leah walking out on her marriage? Remi's symptoms multiply.
Eden's crushed by Remi's news. Mali questions Holden's motives. Cash and Levi are in the doghouse.
Emergency situations compel Dr Beecraft, Dr Glynne and Dr Swanne to refer their patients for specialist treatment.
Paramedics arrive with eight-month-old Noah, who is struggling to breathe. Kathleen, 78, who fell over, requires a CT scan and stitches for deep wounds by her eye.
The police neighbourhood teams get to grips with criminals holed up in a smart suburban semi, a firearm at a local charity and a drug dealer making a run for it. (Ep4)
When 22-year-old Ben arrives after crashing his motorbike at speed, trauma team leader Richard fears his patient may have suffered a life changing spinal cord injury.
Dr Adil Sheraz treats a bus driver with over 100 lipomas, Dr Toby Nelson tries to help a 23-year-old who's covered in keloids, plus a treat of a cyst for Dr Emma McMullen.
